notes:
Runs perfectly with the nvidia 396.54.09 drivers. I had tried before with the 415.x and it didn't start (but I didn't try any of the Proton/Wine environment variables).

I have the slight feeling sync is not absolutely perfect (compared to using retroarch) and that there is a very slight input lag but it's absolutely possible it is the way the remake is done -- I would have to compare with an actual Windows PC. Perfectly playable.
title: R-Type Dimensions EX

notes: 2D mode works perfectly but not all sprites render in 3D mode (not enough for 3D mode to be playable).
title: R-Type Dimensions EX
